summary: Completed testing of iteration 6 nationwide pipeline features. All 11 backend tests pass. Frontend pagination verified working with 16 orders across 2 pages. Fixed captcha_blocked flag_type validation error in Pydantic schema.
seed_data_creation: Created NY order (350 Fifth Avenue, New York, NY) during testing - completed successfully
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 nationwide pipeline features verified working. Key findings: 1) Non-FL orders (CA, TX, NY) process correctly through pipeline, 2) CAPTCHA-blocked orders complete with review_required status (not failed), 3) Portal discovery caches portals in TACountySource table (verified CA, TX, NY portals cached), 4) PDF generation works for all states, 5) FL regression passes - existing orders still work, 6) Pagination shows 10 orders per page with Prev/Next controls (16 total orders, 2 pages), 7) Fixed captcha_blocked flag_type missing from FlagType Literal in schemas/flag.py

bug_fixed.issue: captcha_blocked flag_type not in FlagType Literal causing Pydantic validation error
